summary: Completed comprehensive mobile responsive testing at 390x844 viewport. All 9 requested features verified and working correctly. Homepage renders properly with banner (200px height), promo bar (truncated text, no overflow), 2-column product grid in Flash Deals, categories horizontal scroll. Header has hamburger menu, properly sized icons (44x44px), hidden wishlist on mobile. ProductCard has mobile add-to-cart button (blue circle, 44x44px). Footer renders correctly without overflow. Shop page filter button works, product detail page responsive.
passed_tests: Homepage renders correctly at 390px mobile width - banner visible (200px height)
Promo bar not overflowing - truncate class applied, width fits viewport (390px)
Product cards show correctly in 2-column grid on mobile (Flash Deals section: 167px x 167px columns, 8px gap)
Product cards have mobile add-to-cart button (blue circle at bottom-right, 44x44px tap target)
Header hamburger menu works on mobile - opens Sheet with search and navigation links
Header icons properly sized on mobile (44x44px for theme toggle, cart button)
Wishlist button hidden on mobile as expected
Footer renders correctly on mobile without overflow (width: 390px)
Footer payment badges compact (5 badges: PayPal, M-Pesa, Airtel, Orange, COD)
Footer social icons properly sized (4 icons)
Categories section scrolls horizontally on mobile (scrollWidth: 425px > clientWidth: 342px)
Category items have proper tap targets (60x66.5px)
Shop page filter button works on mobile - opens filter Sheet from left
Filter panel shows categories, brands, and price slider
Product detail page renders correctly on mobile (no horizontal overflow)
Product detail add-to-cart button has proper tap target (358x44px)
No horizontal overflow on any page (body scrollWidth = window width = 390px)
All buttons have minimum 44px tap targets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsive testing completed at 390x844 viewport. All features working: (1) Header: hamburger menu, 44px icons, hidden wishlist, (2) HomePage: 200px banner, truncated promo bar, 2-col Flash Deals grid, horizontal scroll categories, (3) ProductCard: mobile add-to-cart blue circle button (sm:hidden class), (4) Footer: compact layout, 5 payment badges, 4 social icons, (5) ShopPage: filter toggle opens Sheet, 1-col product grid (by design for larger cards), (6) ProductDetail: responsive layout, proper tap targets. CSS mobile optimizations in index.css working (min 44px tap targets, 16px font for inputs). No horizontal overflow issues.
